captions_untagged.explicit: Standing shoulder to shoulder in this crowd, demanding the change we actually deserve. I've never felt more deeply connected to my Egyptian roots than in this exact moment.
captions_untagged.moderate: The sheer scale of the crowd gathered outside the Semiramis InterContinental today is something I'll never forget. You can literally feel the weight of the moment in the air.
captions_untagged.no_leak: A sea of people and waving flags as far as the eye can see against the hazy sky. The sheer volume and energy in the streets today are absolutely overwhelming.
